User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the LifeTrack application. This entity stores basic user profile information and serves as the primary key for all user-specific data, assuming an external authentication system handles credentials.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for display and communication purposes.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user's profile was last updated.

LearningGoal.title: LearningGoal
LearningGoal.description: Defines a user's specific learning goal, including a skill, its difficulty, and a daily target count for questions/tasks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LearningGoal entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this learning goal. (Relationship: User 1:N LearningGoal)

skillName.description: The name of the skill being learned (e.g., 'Python', 'SQL', 'DSA').

difficulty.description: The difficulty level for this skill (e.g., 'Easy', 'Medium', 'Hard').

dailyTargetCount.description: The number of questions or tasks targeted daily for this skill and difficulty level.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the learning goal was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the learning goal was last updated.

DailyLearningProgress.title: DailyLearningProgress
DailyLearningProgress.description: Tracks a user's daily progress for a specific learning goal (skill and difficulty).

id.description: Unique identifier for the DailyLearningProgress entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who made this progress. (Relationship: User 1:N DailyLearningProgress)

date.description: The date for which this progress entry is recorded.

skillName.description: The name of the skill for this progress entry.

difficulty.description: The difficulty level for this progress entry.

goalDailyCount.description: The daily target count for this skill and difficulty on this date.

completedCount.description: The number of questions or tasks completed for this skill and difficulty on this date.

partialCount.description: The number of questions or tasks partially completed for this skill and difficulty on this date.

status.description: The overall status for this specific skill/difficulty on this day (e.g., 'Completed', 'Partial', 'Missed', 'Not Started').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the progress entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the progress entry was last updated.

MonthlyBudget.title: MonthlyBudget
MonthlyBudget.description: Stores the user's overall budget settings and calculations for a specific month and year.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MonthlyBudget entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this monthly budget. (Relationship: User 1:N MonthlyBudget)

month.description: The month number (1-12) for this budget.

totalBudgetAmount.description: The total budget amount set by the user for the month.

initialCalculatedDailyBaseBudget.description: The initial calculated base daily budget for the month after fixed expenses, before any rolling logic.

isLocked.description: Indicates if the budget for this month is locked, preventing further edits (e.g., for past months).

isWeekendExtraBudgetEnabled.description: Toggle to enable or disable extra budget for weekend days.

weekendExtraBudgetPerDayAmount.description: The extra budget amount applied per weekend day, if enabled.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the monthly budget was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the monthly budget was last updated.

FixedExpense.title: FixedExpense
FixedExpense.description: Represents a recurring fixed monthly expense defined by the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FixedExpense entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this fixed expense. (Relationship: User 1:N FixedExpense)

monthlyBudgetId.description: Reference to the MonthlyBudget this fixed expense is associated with. (Relationship: MonthlyBudget 1:N FixedExpense)

name.description: The name of the fixed expense (e.g., 'Rent', 'Electricity Bill').

amount.description: The fixed amount of the expense.

includeInBudget.description: A toggle indicating whether this fixed expense should be deducted from the monthly budget calculation.

expenseCategoryId.description: Reference to the ExpenseCategory this fixed expense belongs to. Must be of type 'fixed'.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the fixed expense was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the fixed expense was last updated.

ExpenseCategory.title: ExpenseCategory
ExpenseCategory.description: Defines a user-created category for organizing expenses.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ExpenseCategory entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this expense category. (Relationship: User 1:N ExpenseCategory)

name.description: The name of the expense category (e.g., 'Groceries', 'Transport').

type.description: The type of the category, distinguishing between daily spending and recurring fixed expenses.

description.description: An optional description for the expense category.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the expense category was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the expense category was last updated.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Records an individual expense transaction made by the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Expense entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who made this expense. (Relationship: User 1:N Expense)

monthlyBudgetId.description: Reference to the MonthlyBudget this expense falls under. (Relationship: MonthlyBudget 1:N Expense)

expenseCategoryId.description: Reference to the ExpenseCategory this expense belongs to. (Relationship: ExpenseCategory 1:N Expense)

amount.description: The monetary amount of the expense.

description.description: A brief description of the expense (e.g., 'Coffee at Starbucks').

date.description: The date when the expense occurred.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the expense record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the expense record was last updated.

DailyBudgetSummary.title: DailyBudgetSummary
DailyBudgetSummary.description: Provides a daily summary of budget performance, including allowed budget, spent amount, and carry-forward/deduction.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DailyBudgetSummary entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User this daily summary belongs to. (Relationship: User 1:N DailyBudgetSummary)

monthlyBudgetId.description: Reference to the MonthlyBudget this daily summary is part of. (Relationship: MonthlyBudget 1:N DailyBudgetSummary)

date.description: The specific date for this budget summary.

calculatedAllowedBudget.description: The total budget allowed for this specific day, considering base budget, carry-forward, and any bonuses.

totalSpentAmount.description: The sum of all expenses logged for this specific day.

netBalance.description: The difference between the calculated allowed budget and the total spent amount for the day (positive for saved, negative for overspent).

carryForwardAmount.description: The amount carried forward to the next day's budget (can be negative if overspent).

baseDailyBudget.description: The base daily budget for the month (Total Budget - Included Fixed Expenses / Days in Month).

weekendBonusAmount.description: The extra budget amount applied for this day if it was a weekend and enabled.

holidayBonusAmount.description: The extra budget amount applied for this day if it was a holiday and enabled.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the daily budget summary was first created/calculated.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the daily budget summary was last updated (e.g., due to expense changes).

DailyDiary.title: DailyDiary
DailyDiary.description: Stores a user's personal diary entry for a specific day, including reflections, plans, and mood.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DailyDiary entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who wrote this diary entry. (Relationship: User 1:N DailyDiary)

date.description: The date for which this diary entry is recorded. (One entry per day per user).

whatIDid.description: A reflection on activities performed during the day.

whatILearned.description: Learnings or insights gained during the day.

tomorrowsPlan.description: Plans or goals for the following day.

mood.description: The user's mood for the day (e.g., 'Happy', 'Neutral', 'Stressed', or an emoji representation).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the diary entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the diary entry was last updated.

Holiday.title: Holiday
Holiday.description: A master list of pre-defined public holidays, which users can choose to enable or disable for extra budget purposes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Holiday entity.

name.description: The common name of the holiday (e.g., 'Diwali', 'Republic Day').

date.description: The specific date of the holiday, including the year (e.g., '2023-11-12').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the holiday record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the holiday record was last updated.

UserHoliday.title: UserHoliday
UserHoliday.description: Stores user-specific settings for holidays, linking to a master holiday or defining a custom one, along with an optional extra budget.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserHoliday entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this holiday setting. (Relationship: User 1:N UserHoliday)

monthlyBudgetId.description: Reference to the MonthlyBudget this holiday setting applies to. (Relationship: MonthlyBudget 1:N UserHoliday)

holidayId.description: Optional reference to a Holiday from the master list if this is a pre-defined holiday. (Relationship: Holiday 1:N UserHoliday)

name.description: The name of the holiday, copied from the master list or custom-defined by the user.

date.description: The specific date of the holiday for which the settings apply.

isEnabled.description: A toggle indicating whether this holiday is enabled by the user to receive extra budget.

extraBudgetAmount.description: The extra budget amount configured by the user for this specific holiday.

isCustom.description: Indicates if this is a user-defined custom holiday rather than one from the master list.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user holiday setting was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user holiday setting was last updated.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. All user-specific data is nested under this user's document.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to Firebase Authentication UID.

definition.description: Stores individual learning goals for a user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this learning goal.

params.name: learningGoalId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific learning goal.

definition.description: Tracks a user's daily progress for a specific learning goal.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who made this progress.

params.name: dailyProgressId
params.description: The unique identifier for the daily learning progress entry.

definition.description: Stores monthly budget settings and overall calculations for a user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this monthly budget.

params.name: monthlyBudgetId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific monthly budget (e.g., YYYYMM).

definition.description: Represents recurring fixed expenses associated with a specific monthly budget.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this fixed expense.

params.name: monthlyBudgetId
params.description: The unique identifier of the monthly budget this fixed expense is linked to.

params.name: fixedExpenseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific fixed expense.

definition.description: Stores user-defined categories for organizing expenses.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this expense category.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific expense category.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who made this expense.

params.name: monthlyBudgetId
params.description: The unique identifier of the monthly budget this expense is linked to.

params.name: expenseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific expense transaction.

definition.description: Provides a daily summary of budget performance for a specific month.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user this daily summary belongs to.

params.name: monthlyBudgetId
params.description: The unique identifier of the monthly budget this daily summary is part of.

params.name: date
params.description: The specific date for this budget summary (e.g., '2023-11-01').

definition.description: Stores a user's personal diary entry for a specific day.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who wrote this diary entry.

params.name: date
params.description: The date for which this diary entry is recorded (e.g., '2023-11-01').

definition.description: A master, globally accessible list of pre-defined public holidays.

params.name: holidayId
params.description: The unique identifier for the master holiday entry.

definition.description: Stores user-specific settings for holidays, linked to a monthly budget.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this holiday setting.

params.name: monthlyBudgetId
params.description: The unique identifier of the monthly budget this user holiday setting applies to.

params.name: userHolidayId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user's specific holiday setting.
